introduction: A weathered chest sits in the shadows, covered in decades of dust. Unlike the cult's belongings elsewhere, this chest predates their arrival by centuries.
The chest bears an ancient seal - three interlocking circles representing old magical wards. Despite the rust and age, the lock yields to your skilled hands.
A faint inscription in Old Common reads: 'For those who walk in darkness seeking light, may these tools serve you well.'
The magical seal dissipates with a soft shimmer as you open the chest. Inside, you find supplies preserved by ancient magic - clearly left for future defenders of the realm.
